title: Pentera Run Scan
content:
Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Pentera pack (Pcysys, partner-supported).

Inputs — PenteraTaskName: The name of the Pentera task to run.

Outputs — Pentera.TaskRun.FullActionReport: Pentera Full Action Report is the summary of the given TaskName in a CSV format, that contains all the actions that Pentera performed during the task run..

Integrations/scripts used: pentera-get-task-run-full-action-report, pentera-get-task-run-status, pentera-run-template-by-name.
raw_yaml:
id: Pentera Run Scan
version: -1
name: Pentera Run Scan
starttaskid: '0'
tasks:
  '0':
    id: '0'
    taskid: 5a959fa6-a7d4-4fa6-8071-47de420ebf6b
    type: start
    task:
      id: 5a959fa6-a7d4-4fa6-8071-47de420ebf6b
      version: -1
      name: ''
      iscommand: false
      brand: ''
      description: ''
    nexttasks:
      '#none#':
      - '3'
    separatecontext: false
    view: "{\n  \"position\": {\n    \"x\": 50,\n    \"y\": 50\n  }\n}"
    note: false
    timertriggers: []
    ignoreworker: false
    skipunavailable: false
    quietmode: 0
  '1':
    id: '1'
    taskid: 3a4bdbe3-2e52-4694-847c-a75c713304a0
    type: regular
    task:
      id: 3a4bdbe3-2e52-4694-847c-a75c713304a0
      version: -1
      name: Run Pentera Template
      script: '|||pentera-run-template-by-name'
      type: regular
      iscommand: true
      brand: ''
      description: ''
    nexttasks:
      '#none#':
      - '4'
    scriptarguments:
      template_name:
        simple: ${inputs.PenteraTaskName}
    separatecontext: false
    view: "{\n  \"position\": {\n    \"x\": 50,\n    \"y\": 340\n  }\n}"
    note: false
    timertriggers: []
    ignoreworker: false
    skipunavailable: false
    quietmode: 0
  '2':
    id: '2'
    taskid: c39055fd-077a-4425-8d66-f67a1115faca
    type: playbook
    task:
      id: c39055fd-077a-4425-8d66-f67a1115faca
      version: -1
      name: GenericPolling
      playbookName: GenericPolling
      type: playbook
      iscommand: false
      brand: ''
      description: ''
    nexttasks:
      '#none#':
      - '7'
    scriptarguments:
      AdditionalPollingCommandArgNames: {}
      AdditionalPollingCommandArgValues: {}
      Ids:
        simple: ${Pentera.TaskRun.ID}
      Interval:
        simple: '1'
      PollingCommandArgName:
        simple: task_run_id
      PollingCommandName:
        simple: pentera-get-task-run-status
      Timeout:
        simple: '60'
      dt:
        simple: Pentera.TaskRun(val.Status == 'Running' || val.Status == 'Cleaning
          up').ID
    separatecontext: true
    loop:
      iscommand: false
      exitCondition: ''
      wait: 1
      max: 0
    view: "{\n  \"position\": {\n    \"x\": 50,\n    \"y\": 660\n  }\n}"
    note: false
    timertriggers: []
    ignoreworker: false
    skipunavailable: false
    quietmode: 0
  '3':
    id: '3'
    taskid: 42db38b6-8f8b-4596-859a-bcc95f2cb854
    type: title
    task:
      id: 42db38b6-8f8b-4596-859a-bcc95f2cb854
      version: -1
      name: Start the Scan
      type: title
      iscommand: false
      brand: ''
      description: ''
    nexttasks:
      '#none#':
      - '1'
    separatecontext: false
    view: "{\n  \"position\": {\n    \"x\": 50,\n    \"y\": 195\n  }\n}"
    note: false
    timertriggers: []
    ignoreworker: false
    skipunavailable: false
    quietmode: 0
  '4':
    id: '4'
    taskid: e219e85f-a56a-4e27-8168-f6d1452e7db0
    type: title
    task:
      id: e219e85f-a56a-4e27-8168-f6d1452e7db0
      version: -1
      name: Wait For The Scan To Complete
      type: title
      iscommand: false
      brand: ''
      description: ''
    nexttasks:
      '#none#':
      - '2'
    separatecontext: false
    view: "{\n  \"position\": {\n    \"x\": 50,\n    \"y\": 515\n  }\n}"
    note: false
    timertriggers: []
    ignoreworker: false
    skipunavailable: false
    quietmode: 0
  '5':
    id: '5'
    taskid: 9edbe478-90d3-4e33-8804-d3ea6679f63f
    type: title
    task:
      id: 9edbe478-90d3-4e33-8804-d3ea6679f63f
      version: -1
      name: Collect The Full Action Report
      type: title
      iscommand: false
      brand: ''
      description: ''
    nexttasks:
      '#none#':
      - '6'
    separatecontext: false
    view: "{\n  \"position\": {\n    \"x\": 50,\n    \"y\": 1155\n  }\n}"
    note: false
    timertriggers: []
    ignoreworker: false
    skipunavailable: false
    quietmode: 0
  '6':
    id: '6'
    taskid: 9dfd1648-57d8-408d-8b83-2df67ab2f8b7
    type: regular
    task:
      id: 9dfd1648-57d8-408d-8b83-2df67ab2f8b7
      version: -1
      name: Retrieve The Full Action Report
      script: '|||pentera-get-task-run-full-action-report'
      type: regular
      iscommand: true
      brand: ''
      description: ''
    scriptarguments:
      task_run_id:
        simple: ${Pentera.TaskRun.ID}
    separatecontext: false
    view: "{\n  \"position\": {\n    \"x\": 50,\n    \"y\": 1300\n  }\n}"
    note: false
    timertriggers: []
    ignoreworker: false
    skipunavailable: false
    quietmode: 0
  '7':
    id: '7'
    taskid: e55b1bd2-c601-4388-8d78-1dc24bae2ef0
    type: title
    task:
      id: e55b1bd2-c601-4388-8d78-1dc24bae2ef0
      version: -1
      name: Update Template Status
      type: title
      iscommand: false
      brand: ''
      description: ''
    nexttasks:
      '#none#':
      - '8'
    separatecontext: false
    view: "{\n  \"position\": {\n    \"x\": 50,\n    \"y\": 835\n  }\n}"
    note: false
    timertriggers: []
    ignoreworker: false
    skipunavailable: false
    quietmode: 0
  '8':
    id: '8'
    taskid: fb9b4b42-aaa1-473d-853b-f35aa18463a8
    type: regular
    task:
      id: fb9b4b42-aaa1-473d-853b-f35aa18463a8
      version: -1
      name: Get Template Status
      script: '|||pentera-get-task-run-status'
      type: regular
      iscommand: true
      brand: ''
      description: ''
    nexttasks:
      '#none#':
      - '5'
    scriptarguments:
      task_run_id:
        simple: ${Pentera.TaskRun.ID}
    separatecontext: false
    view: "{\n  \"position\": {\n    \"x\": 50,\n    \"y\": 980\n  }\n}"
    note: false
    timertriggers: []
    ignoreworker: false
    skipunavailable: false
    quietmode: 0
system: true
view: "{\n  \"linkLabelsPosition\": {},\n  \"paper\": {\n    \"dimensions\": {\n \
  \     \"height\": 1345,\n      \"width\": 380,\n      \"x\": 50,\n      \"y\": 50\n\
  \    }\n  }\n}"
inputs:
- key: PenteraTaskName
  value: {}
  required: true
  description: The name of the Pentera task to run
  playbookInputQuery:
outputs:
- contextPath: Pentera.TaskRun.FullActionReport
  description: Pentera Full Action Report is the summary of the given TaskName in
    a CSV format, that contains all the actions that Pentera performed during the
    task run.
  type: unknown
